nodes.label: Test initialization with valid config and auto_connect=True.
Test initialization with None config raises error when auto_connect=True.
Test successful connection returns self for chaining.
Test calling connect() twice doesn't create new connection.
Test closing when not connected doesn't error.
Test context manager closes even if exception occurs.
Test is_ready returns True when connected and ready.
Test is_ready returns False when connected but not ready.
Test is_ready returns False when not connected.
Test is_ready handles SDK errors gracefully and returns False.
Test collection_exists returns True when collection exists.
Test collection_exists returns False when collection doesn't exist.
Test get_client returns the underlying SDK client.
Test get_client returns None when not connected.
Test query method returns list of dicts.
Test batch_import_objects returns dict with success/error counts.
Test batch_import_objects with empty list returns zero counts.
Test error scenarios and edge cases.
Test that operations raise RuntimeError when client is not connected.
Test that operations raise RuntimeError after close.
Test that connection errors are properly wrapped.
